source: CaseBrain H5 presentation builders (no Brain 1 mutation)

matterConfidence.label: Needs review before relying
matterConfidence.doNotRelyYetReason: Human review or material gaps flagged on current papers.

fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.label: Body-worn video (BWV)
fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.note: BWV is referred to but not safely served in full — chase the full export and continuity before fixing the hearing position. — still chase if disclosure-relevant.

fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.label: Exhibit mapping / provenance
fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.note: Additional source-material appears outstanding on the current file — solicitor to confirm relevance before fixing hearing position. — still chase if disclosure-relevant.

fiveAnswersEvidenceRows.note: Served on bundle — brief plan ledger.

doNotOverstate: Do not import custody safeguards unless the papers support it.
Do not import ABE unless the papers support it.
Do not rely on drug continuity unless lab/continuity material is served.
Assumed position may conflict with interview or served evidence.
Served phone/search/continuity material may support Crown possession and intent if proved.
Do not state "BWV confirms" — Body-worn video is not fully served on papers
Do not state "CAD/999 timing supports" — CAD/999 material is not safely on file as served
hardRules: Referred only does not mean usable.
Inference must be labelled as inference.
No line is sendable just because a source exists.

chaseItems.label: Body-worn video (BWV)
chaseItems.copySuggestion:
Please provide body-worn video (BWV) or confirm in writing why it is not available.

[CaseBrain — CPS chase copy. Evidence state: missing. Source: Police / officer body-worn video. Solicitor review required before sending.]

chaseItems.label: Exhibit mapping / provenance
chaseItems.copySuggestion:
Please provide exhibit mapping / provenance or confirm in writing why it is not available.

[CaseBrain — CPS chase copy. Evidence state: missing. Source: Crown / disclosure officer. Solicitor review required before sending.]

courtNote.text:
The defence asks the court to record outstanding continuity, lab and search/phone material.

[CaseBrain — court line copy. Evidence state: needs review. Confirm before addressing the court.]

exportVersion.reviewFooter: Solicitor review required before sending to CPS, court, or client.
